name_cn:
NÉONOÉ Classic Series #M44020# Uninspected YY#
▪️Size: 26*26*17.5cm▪️
As a classic masterpiece and a must-have for beginners,
the wine bag designed in 1932 for champagne delivery meets contemporary trends,
transforming into a bucket bag embodying heritage beauty,
and is even called the 'King of Classics,'
attracting people of all ages,
with a large capacity design.
This is a classic King that can accompany you through prosperity, and also a bucket bag every woman needs!
